case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC VS. MARIACRISTINA C. YAMBAO et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT YAMBAO, MARIACRISTINA C. DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-07-2010
